summary: Iteration 18 validates Phase 3 Compliance Agent upgrade (all 7 enhancements) end-to-end. Backend pytest: 20/20 pass in ~55s covering CRUD+PATCH+DELETE with new fields (project_ids/expiry_date/status), dashboard shape+math (score=80 exact for 1 overdue+1 critical+1 completed, penalty_exposure sums amount_max=5000), analyze-with-expiry-backfill, renewal plan (docs_needed/steps/portal_url with steps.done=false), penalty calculator (days_overdue computed from due_date, INR range), digest (80-500 word plain text), region+category feed filters (query params applied, region matches field OR title/summary case-insensitive), 404 owner-scope, regression on dashboard/projects/workers/exports. Frontend UI: /compliance ScoreCard visible with score ring + 5 stat tiles (count-overdue/critical/warning/ok/penalty-exposure), each card renders analyze/renew/penalty buttons based on state, view-penalty only shown on overdue, renewal-plan-dialog opens with step-toggle-{id}-{i} checkboxes, toggling all 3 steps auto-transitioned status to 'completed' and score updated from 80→91 (100-15 overdue + int(2/3*10) bonus = 91 confirmed). Add dialog project multi-select toggle works and persists project_ids. /feed shows feed-filters row with region + category + clear-filters, typing 'karnataka' filters to seeded KA item, switching category=gst excludes it (0 cards), clear button appears. Regression: 9 pages (/dashboard /workforce /payroll /subcontractors /reports /insights /compliance /feed /sops) all load without errors.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py compliance_dashboard: bucket assignment puts *all* completed items into 'ok' regardless of their real due-date bucket, then ScoreCard tile 'Healthy' shows counts.ok + totals.completed which double-counts a completed item (once via buckets.ok and once via totals.completed). Confirmed visually: 2 completed items → 'Healthy: 4'. Consider making dashboard.counts.ok exclude the completed items OR make the UI show only totals.completed + non-completed items in buckets.ok. Low priority — cosmetic.

server.py update_compliance history $push uses 'note': ','.join(patch.keys()) — fine, but when PATCH includes the entire renewal_plan object (from step-toggle flow), the note shows 'renewal_plan' rather than something like 'step 2 marked done'. History-of-changes UX could be richer.

Compliance.js daysUntil() uses `new Date(dueStr)` which parses YYYY-MM-DD as UTC midnight. If a user in IST views an item due 'today', new Date - new Date() can be ~-1 (yielding '1d overdue' by 3am IST). Consider using local-midnight compare, or align with backend _compliance_urgency which uses UTC date. Edge-case bug for near-boundary dates.

Compliance.js toggleStep sends the entire renewal_plan object on every checkbox click — for large plans this is a lot of bytes on each tap. Consider a smaller endpoint like PATCH /compliance/{id}/renew/step/{i}. Not a bug.

BureaucracyFeed.js query key ['feed', filterRegion, filterCategory] refetches on *every* keystroke of the region text input. For very fast typing this can create a small refetch storm. Consider a 300ms debounce or an onBlur/Enter trigger.
server.py list_feed region matching does a full-scan .lower() over title+summary; fine at 300 rows but if the feed grows large a Mongo text index on title/summary/region would be worth adding.

success_rate.frontend: 100% — ScoreCard, 5 tiles, renewal dialog with step-toggle auto-complete, penalty button on overdue only, multi-project pills, feed region+category filters all verified

test_credentials: Bearer test_session_karya1 for user test-user-karya1 in karya_database.
seed_data_creation: Backend pytest self-seeds/cleans TEST18_* items (compliance + feed + 1 project). UI test seeded 3 UI18_* compliance items + 1 UI18_ feed item + 1 UI18_Site_X project via authenticated fetch, all CLEANED up after the run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 fully verified. To re-run: `pytest backend/tests/test_iteration18_compliance.py`. Dashboard score math validated: score = 100 - 15*overdue - 8*critical - 4*warning + int(completed/total*10), clamped 0-100. buckets.ok INCLUDES completed items (so ScoreCard 'Healthy = counts.ok + totals.completed' double-counts — see review comment #1). Step-toggle triggers PATCH { renewal_plan, status:'completed'? } and only sets status when EVERY step.done is true — verified in UI (score jumped 80→91 after toggling all 3). Feed region filter matches (a) region field case-insensitively OR (b) region substring inside title/summary — both branches tested. All UI test data is prefixed UI18_ (cleaned); backend pytest uses TEST18_ (cleaned).
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs discovered. One cosmetic double-count in dashboard (see review comment #1) worth noting to main agent, but does not affect score math or any test assertion.
